title: Family and Parenthood Priority Scheme (FPPS)
text:
Family and Parenthood Priority Scheme (FPPS) - SupportGoWhere
Family and Parenthood Priority Scheme (FPPS)
Share link
Up to 60% of Sale of Balance Flats (SBF) and up to 40% of Build-To-Order (BTO) flats are made available for eligible first-timer buyers.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Up to 40% of BTO and 60% of SBF flats reserved for first-timer buyers
If you qualify under the FT(PMC) category, you will be eligible for FPPS
Can apply for both FPPS and 1 other priority scheme simultaneously
Collapse all sections
About this support

Up to 40% of BTO flats and up to 60% of SBF flats are set aside for first-timer buyers

You can apply for the FPPS priority scheme in addition to 1 other priority scheme

A computerised ballot is conducted for each priority scheme:

For example, if your ballot under the Third Child Priority Scheme is not successful, your application will be balloted again under the FPPS

Who is this for?

You and your spouse must be first-timer buyers

Have a Singapore Citizen child (natural or legally adopted) aged 18 and below

Expecting a child and have a doctor's certification of pregnancy

How to apply?

Obtain a HDB Flat Eligibility (HFE) letter through the HDB Flat Portal

If you meet the eligibility criteria during your HFE letter application, you may apply for this scheme in your flat application

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB hotline: 6866-3066

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
